mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.user_id as userId, sm.file_name as fileName, sm.original_name as originalName, sm.file_path as filePath, sm.file_size as fileSize, sm.file_type as fileType, sm.upload_time as uploadTime, sm.show_in_gallery as showInGallery, u.real_name as userName FROM t_study_material sm LEFT JOIN t_user u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sm.upload_time DESC

SELECT sm.id, sm.user_id as userId, sm.file_name as fileName, sm.original_name as originalName, sm.file_path as filePath, sm.file_size as fileSize, sm.file_type as fileType, sm.upload_time as uploadTime, sm.show_in_gallery as showInGallery, u.real_name as userName FROM t_study_material sm LEFT JOIN t_user u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_deleted = 0
AND (sm.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%') OR sm.original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%'))
ORDER BY sm.upload_time DESC

SELECT sm.id, sm.user_id as userId, sm.file_name as fileName, sm.original_name as originalName, sm.file_path as filePath, sm.file_size as fileSize, sm.file_type as fileType, sm.upload_time as uploadTime, sm.show_in_gallery as showInGallery, u.real_name as userName FROM t_study_material sm LEFT JOIN t_user u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.id = #{id} AND sm.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_deleted = 0

SELECT sm.id, sm.user_id as userId, sm.file_name as fileName, sm.original_name as originalName, sm.file_path as filePath, sm.file_size as fileSize, sm.file_type as fileType, sm.upload_time as uploadTime, sm.show_in_gallery as showInGallery, u.real_name as userName FROM t_study_material sm LEFT JOIN t_user u ON sm.user_id = u.id WHERE sm.is_deleted = 0 AND sm.show_in_gallery = 1
AND (sm.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%') OR sm.original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%'))
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{uploaderName}, '%')
ORDER BY sm.upload_time DESC
